title: vitis enneaphylla
intro: Vitis enneaphylla, also known as the nine-leaf grapevine, is a species of plant in the Vitaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis enneaphylla include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
